title: bromus scoparius var. humilis
intro: Bromus scoparius var. humilis, also known as dwarf brome or little brome, is a perennial grass species belonging to the genus Bromus. It is native to Europe and Western Asia, and its medicinal properties have been utilized for centuries. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which may help to soothe digestive issues and reduce fever, offering potential health benefits such as relieving colds and flu symptoms. In herbal preparations, Bromus scoparius var. humilis can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
